text: This study aims to examine the impact of Merdeka Mengajar (MRK) on Teacher Professional Development and Technology Use in SMK Negeri 1 Dlanggu Mojokerto. The study uses qualitative research method to examine the impact of MRK program in increasing educational quality by empowering teachers through improving their teaching skills, promoting cooperation among learners and utilizing online learning materials. The result showed that MRK is a warehouse of alternative learning resources which can be utilized by teacher to improve and enliven the learning process through the application of new methods of teaching in accordance with the demands of the work market. However, there are several problems faced, such as a complexity process to link the technology with the curriculum and infrastructure development. Despite those challenges, the teacher response was extremely positive and most agreed that the application of MRK could improve learning outcomes for students. In conclusion, this study indicated the need for technical support and teacher training in utilizing the benefits of MRK in school. In the context of vocational schools, MRK has a potential to empower the educational development. For this to be accomplished, it is necessary to improve the coordination efforts among principals, developers and teachers that schools can build stronger connections between the curriculum and the preparation of students to work in the era of digital technologies.
